title: Salary of acting governor
doc_html:
§201.1.  Salary of acting governor

The lieutenant governor or any other authorized official, while discharging the duties of the governor, shall receive a salary equal to that of the governor.  

Added by Acts 1975, No. 330, §1.
doc_text:
§201.1.  Salary of acting governor
The lieutenant governor or any other authorized official, while discharging the duties of the governor, shall receive a salary equal to that of the governor.
Added by Acts 1975, No. 330, §1.
